name: Peter S. Kastner Biography for IBM Engagements (VP Era, c.1993-1995)
description: A short professional biography of Peter S. Kastner tailored for IBM client engagements, dating to his Vice President era at Aberdeen Group (approximately 1993-1995). It highlights his expertise in OLTP, parallel databases, client/server, and benchmark auditing, and specifically notes Aberdeen field research on the IBM AS/400 marketplace and a completed project developing RS/6000 sales aids for IBM. Prior career history at Digital Equipment, Prime Computer, Stratus Computer, and Arthur D. Little is included.
